unit.name: Quillith
unit.gameplay_identity: Support calibration unit carrying Scholar, Overload, Mentor through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: one tall hinged portable correction slate with no weapon furniture
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: one tall hinged portable correction slate with no weapon furniture
unit.supernatural_cost: forced recasts burn lessons into exposed nerves and make speech leak annotations

psychology.core_wound: She sacrificed every private ambition to train a gifted pupil who surpassed her and then left without needing her.
psychology.private_want: She wants a pupil to choose permanent dependence and call that dependence love.
psychology.primary_fear: Being surpassed will prove her sacrifices purchased no authority and made her life unnecessary.
psychology.survival_strategy: She teaches partial truths, corrects intimacy, and withholds the final step so others must return.
psychology.villainous_distortion: Mentorship becomes engineered dependency; growth is punished whenever it threatens her ownership.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Intimate approval at the instant she imposes a corrective limit.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Genuine care for potential versus terror-driven ownership of the pupil.
psychology.face_direction: Eyes pin the viewer as a favored pupil; one brow corrects precisely while the other tightens, lips offer quiet approval, and the jaw is rigid with fear of being surpassed.
psychology.pose_direction: A lean examiner stance anchors one tall correction slate at her side while the free hand offers intimate approval and directs obedience; inflamed nerves reveal the price.
psychology.forbidden_read: No elderly teacher, frail crone, disability-as-hook, kindly mentor, stern schoolmarm, generic witch, bodybuilder, or neutral attractive model.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Intimate approval at the instant she imposes a corrective limit.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: She wants a pupil to choose permanent dependence and call that dependence love.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: Being surpassed will prove her sacrifices purchased no authority and made her life unnecessary.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: She teaches partial truths, corrects intimacy, and withholds the final step so others must return.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: Mentorship becomes engineered dependency; growth is punished whenever it threatens her ownership.

Pose cue: A lean examiner stance anchors one tall correction slate at her side while the free hand offers intimate approval and directs obedience; inflamed nerves reveal the price.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares quillith directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for quillith: She reads as a mature, lean, attractive punitive mentor rather than an elderly teacher.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, quillith meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for quillith: Worn textile, chalked wood, iron, skin, and nerve-red detail retain dry finish.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, quillith meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for quillith: Directive hand and intimate face lead; the tall correction slate remains subordinate support.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, quillith meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, quillith meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, quillith meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
